packageRules.description: mcp-auth-proxy edge image — scope 'proxy' (versions every image).
Shared Node base image — scope 'node', LTS-only via workarounds:nodeDockerVersioning.
Discord MCP npm package — scope 'discord' (versions only the discord image).
Hevy MCP npm package — scope 'hevy' (versions only the hevy image).
PagerDuty MCP npm package — scope 'pagerduty' (versions only the pagerduty image).
Todoist MCP npm package — scope 'todoist' (versions only the todoist image).
Trello MCP npm package — scope 'trello' (versions only the trello image).
minor → feat → composite minor bump (Appendix B.2).
patch and digest-only → fix → composite patch bump (Appendix B.2 / D5).

major → feat with a BREAKING CHANGE footer → composite major bump. Renovate appends commitBody after two newlines, landing it in the footer where the angular parser requires the breaking token (Appendix B.2).
Auto-merge non-major bumps once the required CI check passes (platformAutomerge). Majors are excluded — a human reviews BREAKING CHANGE bumps that release every image.
